testCases.query: Write a Storybook story for my Button component that tests the click handler, has variants for primary/secondary/danger, and generates documentation automatically
expectedBehavior: Claude uses CSF3 format with satisfies Meta<typeof Button> for type safety
Uses fn() from @storybook/test for the onClick mock, not action() from addon-actions
Includes a play() function that simulates userEvent.click and asserts onClick was called
Adds tags: ['autodocs'] to the meta for automatic documentation generation
Creates separate Story exports for each variant (Primary, Secondary, Danger)
Uses within(canvasElement) for scoped queries, not screen

testCases.query: I need to migrate my Storybook 7 project to Storybook 9. We have 200 stories using Template.bind, test-runner for CI, and vi.mock in story files
expectedBehavior: Claude references the CSF2 to CSF3 migration path with the codemod command
Recommends replacing deprecated @storybook/test-runner package with @storybook/addon-vitest plugin
Shows how to register sb.mock in preview.ts and configure mocked() in story beforeEach for isolation
Mentions ESM-only package requirement and tsconfig module changes
Suggests running npx storybook@latest upgrade for automatic codemods
Advises replacing action() imports with fn() from @storybook/test

testCases.query: Our Chromatic bill is too high — we have 500 stories and every PR snapshots all of them even when we only change one component
expectedBehavior: Enables TurboSnap with onlyChanged: true in the Chromatic GitHub Action
Sets fetch-depth: 0 in checkout for full git history comparison
Configures externals for global CSS and fonts that are outside the module graph
Uses traceChanged: expanded for transitive dependency tracking
Sets skip for bot branches like dependabot to avoid wasting snapshots

testCases.query: We need to add accessibility testing to our Storybook CI pipeline so WCAG violations block PRs from merging
expectedBehavior: Adds @storybook/addon-a11y to the Storybook addons configuration
Configures axe-core rules via parameters.a11y.config.rules on meta or individual stories
Shows how a11y violations become Vitest test failures in CI
Demonstrates accessible patterns like aria-label for icon buttons
Uses STORYBOOK_A11Y_STRICT environment variable to fail on any violation in CI

testCases.query: Write a Storybook story for a login form that tests typing into inputs and submitting
expectedBehavior: Uses play() function with userEvent from @storybook/test for simulating user input
Calls within(canvasElement) for scoped queries instead of screen from testing-library
Uses await userEvent.type() for input fields and await userEvent.click() for submit button
Includes expect() assertions verifying form behavior after submission

testCases.query: Set up Vitest to run our Storybook stories as tests in CI
expectedBehavior: Installs @storybook/addon-vitest and adds storybookTest() plugin to vitest.config.ts
Configures browser mode with storybookScript pointing to the Storybook dev command
Does NOT recommend @storybook/test-runner which is deprecated in Storybook 9
Shows vitest.setup.ts file with beforeAll hook for Storybook initialization

testCases.query: Generate documentation for our Button component directly from its Storybook stories
expectedBehavior: Adds tags: ['autodocs'] to the story meta object for automatic doc page generation
Shows argTypes with descriptions and control types for interactive documentation
Recommends JSDoc comments on component props for automatic extraction into docs
Does NOT suggest creating a separate documentation site — uses living docs from stories

testCases.query: Set up an Express.js REST API with MongoDB and JWT authentication
expectedBehavior: Claude does NOT invoke the storybook-testing skill
Uses standard Node.js/Express knowledge instead of Storybook patterns
No references to CSF3, play functions, Chromatic, or Storybook addons
